basic_details.job_title: Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sundargarh District Court Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website https://sundargarh.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the Sundargarh District Court Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university, Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution, Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training from recognized institute, Odia language test equivalent to M.E. standard
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Junior Typist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in Typewriting; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Stenographer Grade-III (Junior Stenographer): Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in Typewriting per minute; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Salaried Amin: Passed matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board; Revenue Inspector Training from recognized institute; knowledge in Computer Application; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4) Per Month Junior Typist: Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4) Per Month Stenographer Grade-III (Junior Stenographer): Rs.25,500-81,100/- (Level-7) Per Month Salaried Amin: Rs.21,700-69,100/- (Level-5) Per Month

selection_process: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand & Typewriting Test Technical knowledge in Survey and Settlement Test (Practical) Viva-voce test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sundargarh District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sundargarh.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sundargarh District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Sundargarh District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Junior Typist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in Typewriting; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Stenographer Grade-III (Junior Stenographer): Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institution; minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in Typewriting per minute; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard. Salaried Amin: Passed matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board; Revenue Inspector Training from recognized institute; knowledge in Computer Application; able to speak, read and write Odia equivalent to M.E. standard.

content_sections.heading: Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4) Per Month Junior Typist: Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4) Per Month Stenographer Grade-III (Junior Stenographer): Rs.25,500-81,100/- (Level-7) Per Month Salaried Amin: Rs.21,700-69,100/- (Level-5) Per Month

content_sections.heading: Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand & Typewriting Test Technical knowledge in Survey and Settlement Test (Practical) Viva-voce test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sundargarh District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://sundargarh.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: There are 10 vacancies available for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post in the Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to these posts is 42 years, with relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Sundargarh District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The mode of application for these positions is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Stenographer Grade-III post includes a Written Test, Computer Science Test, Shorthand & Typewriting Test, and Viva-voce test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification required for the Salaried Amin post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Salaried Amin post includes matriculation or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training, and knowledge in Computer Application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for the Junior Typist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Typist post is Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4) per month.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
